<% if (it.seoDescription) { -%>
<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<% } -%>
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox gear
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|gear_type=<%~ it.gearType %>
<% if (it.typeName) { -%>
|type_name=<%~ it.typeName %>
<% } -%>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.gridSize) { -%>
|grid_size=<%~ it.gridSize %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.skinCount) { -%>
|skin_count=<%= it.skinCount %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.minUnlockLevel) { -%>
|min_unlock_level=<%= it.minUnlockLevel %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.maxLevel) { -%>
|max_level=<%= it.maxLevel %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />

<section begin="description" /><%~ it.descriptionText %><section end="description" />
<% if (it.statsSection) { %>
<section begin="stats" />
<%~ it.statsSection -%>
<section end="stats" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.unlocksSection) { %>
<section begin="unlocks" />
<%~ it.unlocksSection -%>
<section end="unlocks" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.upgradesSection) { %>
<section begin="upgrades" />
<%~ it.upgradesSection -%>
<section end="upgrades" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.skinsSection) { %>
<section begin="skins" />
<%~ it.skinsSection -%>
<section end="skins" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Gears]]
[[Category:<%= it.categoryName %>]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated gear source pages]]
